case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. GERMAN CIFUENTES MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GERMAN CIFUENTES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-16-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESETNED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTGERMAN CIFUENTES MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
